reason: Replace deployment-test framing while preserving the approved first three narration takes.
text: ACTOR is part of my deployment framework. Action: what work changes? Context: what may the system know? Trust: when may it recommend, decide, or act? Outcome: what proves value? Recursive: how does this run improve the next one? Tokens are inputs. Value appears when the workflow changes and the customer keeps the capability.

postprocess.music_edit: Keep the first 56.048 seconds unchanged and stretch only the ACTOR tail.
